holdings.infoBox: USD is an equity ETF with a total of 51 individual holdings.

overview.description: The ProShares Ultra Semiconductors (USD) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Dow Jones U.S. Semiconductors index. The fund provides 2x exposure to a market-cap-weighted index that tracks the performance of large US semiconductor companies. USD was launched on Jan 30, 2007 and is issued by ProShares.
